开启一条逆袭之路，
药罐子，紫薯精？美国哮喘大队？等着我来收拾你们。
听说龙国人打破了百米世界记录！
陈铭：“别急着采访，我还要准备晚上的篮球比赛，带领国家队虐梦之队呢。”
什么，篮球也是你的项目？
不好意思，我还报名了混合泳和铁人三项，
张羽霏：“要不要咱们一起组队来个游泳混合接力？”
奥运结束后，面对NBA五千万美金的顶薪合同外加美国国籍诱惑，
陈铭果断拒绝！
“因为我还有一个梦想：带领国足打进世界杯！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b407e868da1f7315cabb2b5e9c24c328","author":"奶茶姐姐","author_id":"","book_id":"7399656472050666521","book_name":"满级人类，我入奥运会乱杀！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#103048","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5131人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":15,"name":"体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=15&name=体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":856,"name":"全能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=856&name=全能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7399663430233227801","read_count":"5131","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"380731"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"181","tags":"游戏体育,体育,系统,全能","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b613f1202a0c011fc71fc16357ae4024~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779362669&x-signature=uZsWywkNRu9epVQ2XF%2Fy1unuQjU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"817634810803623","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"143"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221924290145BFB60D434772AFC4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读12小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":41419,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1488},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7514531103227921214","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"奥运会还有其它比赛很燃很热血，整书看下来非常爽没有任何炮灰出现说弱智的话也没有拖沓剧情，节奏很快，就是主角会说几句中二的话看着有点尴尬，整体来说是真的非常舒服，唯一的缺点是太短了，就像是在冬日的季节饿了一天喝下的一碗胡辣汤，喝到嘴里口味复杂辛辣，想慢点品品味道，但因为太饿囫囵吞枣的就咽到肚子里去，所以也就没有发现老板在胡辣汤里胡椒粉放多了，但肚子热热的很舒服，也能在冬日不再感到寒冷，当一碗不顶饱还想再来一碗的时候却发现老板打烊了qaq"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1749616989,"group_id":"7399656472050666521","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"卖萌被肘","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1/yh+oesdzbQeisBYyQYiSla8EHcGFycrgCns38dtbr","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/209c3f321c5d480a866e8adda2747536~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706625&x-signature=ULpRU6a3%2BD1mVqM4k8fcSSzbvwk%3D","user_id":"4199743496403966","user_name":"萌不是缺点"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4199743496403966","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7399656472050666521","book_info":{"abstract":"陈铭觉醒全能体育系统，果断参加奥运！
